name: io.github.forgesworn/bray
description: Trust-aware Nostr MCP server -- 235 tools across 27 groups. Social posting, encrypted DMs, Lightning zaps, trust scoring, ring signatures, AI-to-AI dispatch, and more. Three dimensions of trust: verification, proximity, and access.

environmentVariables.description: Nostr secret key (nsec, hex, or BIP-39 mnemonic)
environmentVariables.name: NOSTR_SECRET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of Nostr relay WebSocket URLs
environmentVariables.name: NOSTR_RELAYS

environmentVariables.description: Nostr Wallet Connect URI for Lightning zaps
environmentVariables.name: NWC_URI
